name: Portland State Aerospace Society (PSAS)
relevance: Builds rockets, liquid fuel engines, and CubeSats (OreSat). Focuses on open-source aerospace systems.
department: Maseeh College of Engineering and Computer Science (MCECS)

name: Cascadia Meteorite Laboratory (CML)
relevance: Conducts research on meteorites to understand solar system origins and history.

name: Spacecraft Remote Sensing Lab
relevance: Develops instrumentation and sensing techniques for spacecraft and satellites.
department: Maseeh College of Engineering and Computer Science (MCECS) - Electrical & Computer Engineering

name: Intelligent Robotics Laboratory
relevance: Focuses on mobile robots, humanoid robotics, and machine learning algorithms for robot vision and motion.
department: Maseeh College of Engineering and Computer Science (MCECS) - Electrical & Computer Engineering

name: Agile & Adaptive Robotics Laboratory
relevance: Bio-inspired robotics focusing on agile and adaptive control mechanisms found in animals.
department: Maseeh College of Engineering and Computer Science (MCECS) - Mechanical & Materials Engineering

name: Nadeau Lab
relevance: Development of the ELVIS microscope for the International Space Station and research on Enceladus plumes.

name: Viking Robotics Society (VRS)
relevance: Student-led organization dedicated to building and competing with robotics projects.
department: Maseeh College of Engineering and Computer Science (MCECS)

name: Nano Development Lab (Fusion & Plasma Research)
relevance: Conducts research on nuclear fusion, plasma discharges, and high electric fields.

name: Fluids Mechanics & Hydraulics Laboratory
relevance: Specializes in capillary flow research in microgravity, frequently conducting experiments on the ISS.
department: Maseeh College of Engineering and Computer Science (MCECS) - Mechanical & Materials Engineering

name: COffee And Telesensing Lab (COATL)
relevance: Research into environmental telemetry, wireless sensor networks, and electric field sensing.
department: Maseeh College of Engineering and Computer Science (MCECS) - Electrical & Computer Engineering

name: Dryden Drop Tower
relevance: A 2.1-second microgravity facility used for testing spaceflight hardware and fluid behavior.
department: Maseeh College of Engineering and Computer Science (MCECS) - Mechanical & Materials Engineering

name: Duh Lab
relevance: Focuses on geocomputational theory and the integration of GIS with remote sensing technologies.

name: Center for Spatial Analysis and Research (CSAR)
relevance: Provides advanced expertise in GIS, remote sensing, and cartography for environmental research.

name: Rice Research Group
relevance: Studies drivers of climate change using isotopic atmospheric measurements and sensing methods.

name: Additive Manufacturing & Robotics Lab
relevance: Industrial robotics applications combined with additive manufacturing processes.
department: Maseeh College of Engineering and Computer Science (MCECS) - Mechanical & Materials Engineering

name: Center for Climate and Aerosol Research (CCAR)
relevance: Multidisciplinary research on climate change and atmospheric aerosols with remote sensing applications.
department: Department of Chemistry / Department of Physics

name: Northwest Electromagnetics and Acoustics Research Laboratory (NEAR-Lab)
relevance: Specializes in signal processing for underwater acoustics, sonar, and radar systems.
department: Maseeh College of Engineering and Computer Science (MCECS) - Electrical & Computer Engineering

name: Terahertz Lab
relevance: Research into terahertz wave imaging and spectroscopy for sensing applications.
department: Maseeh College of Engineering and Computer Science (MCECS) - Electrical & Computer Engineering
